stemHtml:
METAR EGTK 090950Z 09003KT 6000 NSC 04/00 Q1031 NOSIG

Based on the METAR, fill in the gaps:

There are no (1)___ under the height of (2)___ above the aerodrome, and no (3)___ at any height. No expected changes within the next (4)___.

options.b:
(1) Clouds covering more than half of the sky;
(2) 5 000ft;
(3) CB;
(4) 2 hours.
